message:
fix(install): declare MIGRATED_BEARER_TOKEN variable

Add missing MIGRATED_BEARER_TOKEN="" initialization alongside the other
Python migration state variables. Without this declaration, the variable
would be unset and could cause unbound-variable errors under set -u or
produce incorrect bearer token migration behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -431,6 +431,7 @@ PYTHON_DETECTED=0
 PYTHON_DB_FOUND=0
 PYTHON_DB_PATH=""
 PYTHON_DB_MIGRATED_PATH=""
+MIGRATED_BEARER_TOKEN=""
 
 # T1.1: Detect Python am alias in shell rc files
 detect_python_alias() {
